scenarios.description: First invocation when internal cache is null initializes and returns non-empty unmodifiable tag set
scenarios.precondition: no prior calls to Parser.tagSet() in this JVM
scenarios.expectedResult: non-empty Set<String> containing known HTML tags (e.g. 'div'), unmodifiable
pseudocode: TEST TC01 initial tagSet initializes cache
// Ensure no previous call: fresh ClassLoader/clear static field via reflection

scenarios.description: Second invocation when cache is populated returns same contents without reinitializing
scenarios.precondition: Parser.tagSet() has been called once already
scenarios.expectedResult: Set<String> equal to first result, identity may be same or cached copy, unmodifiable
pseudocode: TEST TC02 subsequent tagSet returns cached set

scenarios.description: Attempt to modify returned set triggers UnsupportedOperationException for remove() path
scenarios.precondition: Parser.tagSet() has been called, returned set is unmodifiable
pseudocode: TEST TC03 remove on tagSet throws
